ogTitle: Oakey Park vs Oakhampton Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oakey Park and Oakhampton Heights.
heading: Oakey Park vs Oakhampton Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oakey Park, New South Wales and Oakhampton Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oakey Park has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Oakhampton Heights (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oakey Park or Oakhampton Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oakey Park has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Oakhampton Heights scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oakey Park scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Oakhampton Heights scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oakey Park or Oakhampton Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oakey Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
